creator: fgudin+fbsd@bsdbellule.fr
text:
Hi,

created a FreeBSD 10.3 VM to run poudriere: see new attachments (poudriere testport log and updated patch)
To sum it up:
- added gettext to USES (poudriere advised so)
- deleted empty last line from distinfo
- fixed MASTER_SITES (portlint warning confused me) to plain http, as we've got checksum in distinfo anyway

Sorry for the poor initial submission quality.

Best regards,
-- 
Francis
